title: Cobalt - Your AI Developer With Its Own Computer
excerpt: Cobalt is an AI developer that works on your GitHub repository from its own cloud computer. Describe a task, watch your app change live, and come back to working software - no local setup required.
content_html:
Hand off a coding task. Come back to a working app.

Cobalt is an AI developer with its own cloud computer. It writes code in your GitHub repository, runs the tests, and shows you your app running live while it works - even after you close the tab.

  • No local setup - everything runs on Cobalt's computers
  • Runs OpenAI Codex with your ChatGPT account - Claude Code, Pi, OpenCode and more to come
  • Run tasks in parallel - each feature, experiment, or spike gets its own computer
  • Changes arrive as commits and pull requests you review

Your conversation and your running app, in one place.

What would you hand off first?

Cobalt takes on the everyday software work that normally waits for a free afternoon.

Ship the feature you keep postponing

Describe what you want in plain language. Cobalt builds it, runs the tests, and opens a pull request for you to review.

Fix bugs without setting up a dev environment

Every task gets a ready-to-code computer with your repository on it. Reproduce the bug, fix it, and see the fix running - from any browser.

Turn ideas into running prototypes

Don't debate a mockup. Have Cobalt build a working version, then click through it live before you commit to the idea.

Run features, experiments, and spikes in parallel

Kick off several tasks at once - a feature build, a refactor spike, a quick experiment. Each gets its own computer, so there are no extra checkouts, worktrees, or stashes to juggle on your machine.

Three steps to your first pull request

Connect once. After that, every task is just a conversation.

Chat-only assistants stop at suggestions. Cobalt gives Codex a real computer, so it can finish the job and show you it works.

Runs your whole stack, not just a frontend

With full access to its own cloud machine, Cobalt runs complex applications - multiple services, databases, complex configuration, Docker - not just a Next.js frontend.

Watch your app run while Cobalt works

When your application starts, a clickable preview opens beside the conversation and updates as the code changes.

Closing your laptop doesn't stop the work

Tasks keep running after you leave. Come back on any device to the full conversation, the files, and your running app - exactly where you left them.

Changes end up where they belong: GitHub

Cobalt clones your repository, commits its work, and opens pull requests. You review and merge as you would any other change.

Your code and credentials stay guarded

Each task runs in its own isolated computer, and GitHub access is granted only while work is running - it is never stored on the machine.

Start new tasks from a ready-made setup

Save any computer as a named starting point - dependencies installed, services configured - and skip the setup for every future task.

Latest news

Product updates from the Cobalt team

Launch notes, product updates, and practical guidance for handing software work to Cobalt.

View all posts

Give your next task to Cobalt

Connect a repository and see your first change running in minutes.

Try Cobalt

blocks.html_en: Connect a repository and see your first change running in minutes.

sentences.en: Connect a repository and see your first change running in minutes.
sentences.zh: 连接存储库并在几分钟内查看您的第一个更改正在运行。

content_html_zh:
移交编码任务。 返回到一个正在运行的应用程序。

Cobalt是一家人工智能开发商，拥有自己的云计算机。 它会在您的 GitHub 存储库中编写代码，运行测试，并向您显示您的应用程序在运行时实时运行 - 即使您关闭选项卡后也是如此。

  • 无需本地设置 - 一切都在 Cobalt 的计算机上运行
  • 使用您的 ChatGPT 帐户运行 OpenAI Codex - Claude Code、Pi、OpenCode 等
  • 并行运行任务 - 每个功能、实验或峰值都有自己的计算机
  • 更改随着您审查的提交和拉取请求而到达

您的对话和正在运行的应用程序位于一处。

你会先交出什么？

Cobalt 承担了通常需要等到下午空闲的日常软件工作。

发布您一直推迟的功能

用通俗易懂的语言描述你想要什么。 Cobalt 构建它，运行测试，并打开拉取请求供您查看。

无需设置开发环境即可修复错误

每个任务都会有一台准备编码的计算机，上面有您的存储库。 重现错误，修复它，并从任何浏览器查看修复运行情况。

将想法转化为可运行的原型

不要争论模型。 让 Cobalt 构建一个工作版本，然后在你承诺这个想法之前点击实时查看它。

并行运行特征、实验和峰值

一次启动多项任务 - 功能构建、重构峰值、快速实验。 每个人都有自己的计算机，因此无需在计算机上处​​理额外的结账、工作树或存储。

完成第一个拉取请求的三个步骤

连接一次。 之后，每项任务都只是一次对话。

仅限聊天的助理只会提出建议。 Cobalt 为 Codex 提供了一台真正的计算机，因此它可以完成工作并向您展示它的工作原理。

运行整个堆栈，而不仅仅是前端

通过完全访问自己的云机器，Cobalt 可以运行复杂的应用程序 - 多个服务、数据库、复杂的配置、Docker - 而不仅仅是 Next.js 前端。

在 Cobalt 工作时观察您的应用程序运行

当您的应用程序启动时，对话旁边会打开一个可单击的预览，并随着代码的更改而更新。

关闭笔记本电脑并不会停止工作

您离开后任务继续运行。 在任何设备上返回完整的对话、文件和正在运行的应用程序 - 就在您离开的位置。

更改最终会到达它们所属的地方：GitHub

Cobalt 克隆您的存储库、提交其工作并打开拉取请求。 您可以像进行任何其他更改一样进行审查和合并。

您的代码和凭据受到保护

每个任务都在自己独立的计算机中运行，并且仅在工作运行时才授予 GitHub 访问权限 - 它永远不会存储在计算机上。

从现成的设置开始新任务

将任何计算机保存为命名起点 - 安装依赖项、配置服务 - 并跳过每个未来任务的设置。

最新消息

Cobalt 团队的产品更新

将软件工作交给 Cobalt 的发布说明、产品更新和实用指南。

View all posts

将你的下一个任务交给 Cobalt

连接存储库并在几分钟内查看您的第一个更改正在运行。

Try Cobalt
